prompt: Professional luxury brand logo for 'Monarch X Capital' - an executive advisory and investment firm. Design: Elegant crowned letter M monogram with a refined five-point crown above it. Below the M, the text 'MONARCH X' in wide-tracked elegant serif font (Didot or Bodoni style), with 'CAPITAL' underneath in lighter weight, wider tracking. Color palette: Rich gold metallic gradient on deep navy-black background (#141425). Style: Clean, minimal, timeless luxury - think Rolex meets Goldman Sachs. Double-line separator between monogram and text with small diamond accent in center. Subtle gold glow effect. NO other text, NO taglines, NO additional elements. The spelling must be exactly: MONARCH X and CAPITAL. Ultra clean, print-ready quality.
